title: stachys recta var. angusta
intro: Stachys recta var. angusta, also known as narrow-leaved woundwort, is a plant species within the genus Stachys, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various ailments, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of consuming or applying Stachys recta var. angusta include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications, from topical treatments to internal remedies.
